summary: Good‑quality audience recording with balanced mix and crisp cymbals despite the coliseum’s acoustics
review: The reviewer praises the balance and cymbal detail of this multi‑source (likely audience) recording, noting that the venue’s poor acoustics do not completely ruin the sound. While the coliseum “tapers no favor,” decent sources keep the overall quality solid, earning a respectable four‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focused on recording quality; it’s positive (4 ★) but gives no insight into the musical performance, so the rating reflects good audio with limited show information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Venue acoustics are poor ('crappy sounding coliseum'), but multiple decent sources yield a balanced mix with clear cymbal detail.
